abstract: Decides whether to display content with a given MIME type.

declaration.code: optional func webView(_ webView: WebView!, decidePolicyForMIMEType type: String!, request: URLRequest!, frame: WebFrame!, decisionListener listener: (any WebPolicyDecisionListener)!)

overview:
## Discussion

This method is invoked during the process of loading content for `request` after the `webView:didStartProvisionalLoadForFrame:` method in the `WebFrameLoadDelegate` protocol is called by the `WebView` object. The web view implements a policy decision by sending one of the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebPolicyDecisionListener] protocol messages to `listener`.

If you do not implement this method, the default behavior is used. The listener is told to ignore the MIME type unless `webView` specifies it can handle the type in its [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebView-swift.class/canShowMIMEType(_:)] method.

In some rare cases, multiple responses may be received for a single resource. This happens in the case of multipart/x-mixed-replace, also known as a “server push.” In this case, this method will be invoked multiple times.

# webView(_:decidePolicyForMIMEType:request:frame:decisionListener:)

**Instance Method**

Decides whether to display content with a given MIME type.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func webView(_ webView: WebView!, decidePolicyForMIMEType type: String!, request: URLRequest!, frame: WebFrame!, decisionListener listener: (any WebPolicyDecisionListener)!)
```

## Parameters

- **webView**: The associated web view.
- **type**: The MIME type of the content.
- **request**: The request to load the content.
- **frame**: The frame for displaying the content.
- **listener**: The object that receives the policy decision.

## Discussion

This method is invoked during the process of loading content for `request` after the `webView:didStartProvisionalLoadForFrame:` method in the `WebFrameLoadDelegate` protocol is called by the `WebView` object. The web view implements a policy decision by sending one of the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebPolicyDecisionListener] protocol messages to `listener`.

If you do not implement this method, the default behavior is used. The listener is told to ignore the MIME type unless `webView` specifies it can handle the type in its [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebView-swift.class/canShowMIMEType(_:)] method.

In some rare cases, multiple responses may be received for a single resource. This happens in the case of multipart/x-mixed-replace, also known as a “server push.” In this case, this method will be invoked multiple times.
title: webView(_:decidePolicyForMIMEType:request:frame:decisionListener:)
